title: Path-wise tree recurrence
summary: Defines the left-comb paths, subtrees, vertex defect coefficients, and the first recurrence differential governing the intended slot-wise Q-commutator cancellation.

mathematicalContent.heading: Paths and subtrees
mathematicalContent.body: Each input leaf determines a path to the root. For a vertex v, the recurrence uses the sum of input weights below v and the total exponent on proper descendants of v.

mathematicalContent.heading: Vertex defect coefficient
mathematicalContent.body: The local coefficient attached to v and a degree-s index β is the dimension/weight expression recorded by the intended commutator calculation.

mathematicalContent.heading: Rank recurrence
mathematicalContent.body: For a coefficient system A of degree s+1, the jth lowering operator sums Cᵥ(β)A(β+eᵥ) along the path from leaf j to the root. The recurrence requires every such sum to vanish.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines degree-k coefficient systems on left-comb indices.

correspondence.leanType: def leafVertex {r : ℕ} (j : Fin r) : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Returns the vertex representing the jth leaf in the left-comb numbering.

correspondence.leanType: def IsInternal {r : ℕ} (v : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) : Prop
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Declares a vertex internal when its code is smaller than r−1.

correspondence.leanType: def leafBelow {r : ℕ} (v : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) (j : Fin r) : Prop
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines when a leaf lies in the subtree rooted at v, using the left-comb layout.

correspondence.leanType: def onPathToRoot {r : ℕ} (j : Fin r) (v : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) : Prop
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines membership of a vertex in the path from leaf j to the root.

correspondence.leanType: def pathToRoot {r : ℕ} (j : Fin r) : Finset (Fin (leftCombVertexCount r))
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Forms the finite set of vertices on the leaf-to-root path.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{Path}(j)=\{v\in V_r:v\text{ lies on the path from }j\text{ to the root}\}.

correspondence.leanType: def isDescendant {r : ℕ} (v x : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) : Prop
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the proper-descendant relation for the chosen left-comb numbering.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: x\in\operatorname{Desc}(v)\iff v\text{ is internal and }x\text{ lies strictly below }v.

correspondence.leanType: def descendants {r : ℕ} (v : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) : Finset (Fin (leftCombVertexCount r))
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Forms the finite set of proper descendants of v.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{Desc}(v)=\{x\in V_r:x\text{ is a proper descendant of }v\}.

correspondence.leanType: def subtreeWeight {r : ℕ} (v : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) (w : Fin r → ℝ) : ℝ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Sums the input weights over leaves below a vertex.

correspondence.leanType: def descendantPowerSum {r s : ℕ} (β : CombIndex r s) (v : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) : ℕ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Sums the tree exponents over proper descendants of a vertex.

correspondence.leanType: def defectCoeff {r s : ℕ} (n : ℝ) (w : Fin r → ℝ) (β : CombIndex r s) (v : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) : ℝ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the local defect coefficient used by the recurrence.

correspondence.leanType: def lowerAtVertex {r s : ℕ} (n : ℝ) (w : Fin r → ℝ) (v : Fin (leftCombVertexCount r)) (A : CombCoeffSpace r (s + 1)) : CombCoeffSpace r s
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the contribution obtained by raising β at v and multiplying by the local defect coefficient.

correspondence.leanType: def pathDefectCoeff {r s : ℕ} (n : ℝ) (w : Fin r → ℝ) (A : CombCoeffSpace r (s + 1)) (j : Fin r) (β : CombIndex r s) : ℝ
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Sums the vertex contributions along the path of the jth input slot.

correspondence.leanType: def dOne {r s : ℕ} (n : ℝ) (w : Fin r → ℝ) (A : CombCoeffSpace r (s + 1)) : Fin r → CombCoeffSpace r s
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the first recurrence differential as the collection of all slot-wise path defects.

correspondence.leanType: def RankRecurrenceAtLevel {r s : ℕ} (n : ℝ) (w : Fin r → ℝ) (A : CombCoeffSpace r (s + 1)) : Prop
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the level-(s+1) recurrence by requiring every slot-wise defect coefficient to vanish.

correspondence.leanType: def RankRecurrence {r k : ℕ} (n : ℝ) (w : Fin r → ℝ) (A : CombCoeffSpace r k) : Prop
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the full degree-k recurrence; degree zero is vacuous and positive degree uses the preceding level predicate.

correspondence.leanType: theorem recurrence_iff_dOne_zero {r s : ℕ} (n : ℝ) (w : Fin r → ℝ) (A : CombCoeffSpace r (s + 1)) : RankRecurrenceAtLevel n w A ↔ dOne n w A = fun _j => (fun _β => 0)
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Proves that the recurrence equations are exactly the statement that the first differential is zero.

references.locator: Main ambient construction and tangentiality results
references.note: Motivation for rank-general nested Laplacian words; the Lean tree complex goes beyond what is currently instantiated.

limitations: The file explicitly records the combinatorial recurrence but does not derive it from the ambient Q-commutator of nested tree words. Consequently it does not prove that a recurrent coefficient system yields a tangential geometric operator.
